name: @daedalus-pi/desktop
description: Electron host shell for the Daedalus GUI

scripts.build: bun run build:main && bun run build:gui && bun run build:app-server
scripts.build:dev: bun build src/main.ts --outdir .daedalus/desktop-dev --target node --format esm --external electron --sourcemap=external && bun build src/preload.ts --outdir .daedalus/desktop-dev --entry-naming [name].cjs --target node --format cjs --external electron --sourcemap=external
scripts.build:main: bun build src/main.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external electron --sourcemap=external && bun build src/preload.ts --outdir dist --entry-naming [name].cjs --target node --format cjs --external electron --sourcemap=external
scripts.package: bun run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.ts && bun scripts/print-package-artifacts.ts
scripts.package:dir: bun run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.ts --dir && bun scripts/print-package-artifacts.ts
